programs.desc: Rumors begin to swirl at school when a mysterious rash sends Daria to the hospital.

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: The pain builds as Beavis and Butt-head spend the day in line for a porta potty outside the "Creatures of Rock" concert.

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: Butt-head is really screwed when a visit to the hospital once again awakens The Great Cornoholio in Beavis. But two rooms over, the leader of a cult has died. Is the Great Cornholio destined to be the cult's idiot savior?

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: To teach them that crime doesn't pay, Beavis & Butt-head's principal sends them to prison for a day. Bad idea.

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: It's the end of the world as they know it, and Beavis and Butt-head feel fine. When the apocalypse leaves them behind, Highland's biggest idiots have run of the town. Will they finally score? Not even when they're the last men on earth.

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: An unusually upbeat episode where everything seems to happen in Beavis and Butt-head's favor. They find porn, see a car accident, two dogs humping and more.
